name: exam_chart_app
description: Adds an 'Exam' tab to the note body that walks providers through Reason for Visit, HPI, ROS, Physical Exam, and Assessment & Plan (with diagnoses and orders) in one guided form. Clicking Finalize Exam emits the corresponding Canvas commands.

protocols.description: NoteApplication rendering the Exam tab on the note body. Declared under protocols (not applications) to keep the entry out of the chart's 9-dot drawer — the drawer is populated from plugin_io_application rows that only the applications array creates. The plugin runner still loads the class so the SDK's APPLICATION__ON_GET event wires the note tab.

Form-state load/save + finalize handler for the Exam tab. Reads/writes the plugin's own AttributeHub namespace (see custom_data block); reads Condition, Questionnaire, Staff via the SDK ORM. data_access read/write left empty: populated arrays on SimpleAPI handlers silently break route registration in the plugin runtime (observed against canvas_sdk 0.142.0). Matches the prevailing MSF-merged convention for SimpleAPI handlers (portal-content, encounter_list, provider-calendaring use empty arrays).

Database-backed search endpoints (RFV codings, ICD-10, labs, medications, imaging, service providers, staff) powering the form dropdowns. data_access arrays empty for the same reason as ExamChartingAPI above.
Renders the Narrative additional-field on ROS and PE commands; reads pre-fill text from AttributeHub
Clears the plugin's draft form state in AttributeHub when a Note is deleted
